2606.20177.title: Evaluating and Enhancing Negation Comprehension in Remote Sensing MLLMs
2606.20177.paper_summary: Multimodal Large Language Models (MLLMs) have demonstrated remarkable success in various Remote Sensing (RS) tasks. However, their ability to comprehend negation remains underexplored, limiting deployment in real-world applications where models must explicitly identify what is false or absent, e.g., emergency responders need to locate non-flooded routes for evacuation. To comprehensively study this limitation, we introduce RS-Neg, the first benchmark to evaluate negation understanding across region-level to scene-level tasks. Specifically, we design an automated data generation pipeline for RS imagery, using LLMs to synthesize diverse negation queries, and introduce a dynamic visual focus module for verification. Our evaluation reveals that advanced RS MLLMs struggle with negation, exhibiting hallucinations and substantial performance degradation. To close this gap, we propose NeFo, a novel test-time learning method that explicitly incorporates the logical role of negation into the model optimization. Remarkably, using about 5\% unlabeled test samples, NeFo significantly improves the negation understanding of models and shows strong generalization to unseen tasks. Code and data will be released upon acceptance.
2606.20177.paper_summary_zh: 多模態大型語言模型（MLLMs）在各種遙感（RS）任務中展現了顯著的成功。<lb/>然而，它們理解否定的能力仍然未被充分探索，這限制了它們在現實應用中的部署，因為模型必須明確識別什麼是錯誤或缺失，例如，緊急救援人員需要找到未被淹沒的撤離路線。<lb/>為了全面研究這一限制，我們推出了RS-Neg，這是第一個基準，用於評估從區域級到場景級任務的否定理解。<lb/>具體而言，我們設計了一個自動化數據生成管道，用於RS影像，利用LLMs合成多樣的否定查詢，並引入了一個動態視覺聚焦模塊以進行驗證。<lb/>我們的評估顯示，先進的RS MLLMs在否定方面表現不佳，出現了幻覺和顯著的性能下降。<lb/>為了縮小這一差距，我們提出了NeFo，一種新穎的測試時學習方法，明確將否定的邏輯角色納入模型優化中。<lb/>值得注意的是，使用約5\%的未標記測試樣本，NeFo顯著提高了模型的否定理解能力，並對未見過的任務展現了強大的泛化能力。<lb/>代碼和數據將在接受後發布。
2606.20177.author: Haochen Han et.al.
2606.20177.authors: Haochen Han, Jue Wang, Alex Jinpeng Wang, Fangming Liu
